title: Vaan Engum Nee Minna Lyrics Endrendrum Punnagai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vaan Engum Nee Minna
Singer(s): Aalap Raju, Harini, Devan, Pravin
Movie: Endrendrum Punnagai
Music: Harrish Jeyaraaj
Lyrics: Karky

My Love, its all for you
moon n sun shine on you ..

Vaan engum nee minna minna
naan enna naan enna panna, panna

en manam kinnathil, ne ennai ootrinaai
kai alliye ven vinniley
yen vannam maatrinaai

Vaan engum nee minna minna
naan enna naan enna panna, panna

en vanavilliley, nee nool parikiraai
annooliley un nenjinai yen korka paarkiraai

Oh oh priya priya
idhayathil adhirvu neeyaa
enadhunarvidhe  thavam kidandhadhey
tharai vandha varam neeyaa . (2)

Pookkal illaa ulaginiley
vazhndheney unnai kaanum varai
naan indro poovukulley sirai

un vaasam en vazhvin ellai enbeney
un vaasam nurai eeral naan
theendak kandaeney
moochu mutta thaan naan
unmel kadhal kondaeney

Vaan engum nee minna minna
naan enna naan enna panna, panna

en vanavilliley, nee nool parikiraai
annooliley un nenjinai yen korka paarkiraai

Paalai ondraai varundhirundhen
nee thaagam nadhiyena vandhaai
en vazhvil pasumaya thandhaai

Oh en nenjam neer endraal
neendhum meenaa nee..
en kadhal kadu endraal
meyum maanaa nee..

Vaan engum nee minna minna
naan enna naan enna panna, panna

en vanavilliley, nee nool parikiraai
annooliley un nenjinai yen korka paarkiraai

Oh oh priya priya
idhayathil adhirvu neeyaa
enadhunarviley thavam kidandhadhey
tharai vandha varam neeyaa . (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings, portraying love as a celestial connection between two souls.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Endrendrum Punnagai, the song highlights the blossoming romance between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Aalap Raju and Harini.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Vaan Engum Nee Minna was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 25, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaan Engum Nee Minna, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the enchanting voices of Aalap Raju and Harini. The song captures the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments in Endrendrum Punnagai. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and warmth. This duet is not just a song but a celebration of love that resonates with anyone who has experienced its magic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaan Engum Nee Minna from Endrendrum Punnagai is a mesmerizing romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Aalap Raju and Harini, this song weaves a magical atmosphere that resonates with every listener. The collaboration of heartfelt lyrics and Harrish Jeyaraj's captivating music makes it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: My love, it's all for you, moon and sunshine on you.
You are everywhere, what should I do, what should I do?
In my heart, you have embraced me, you have changed my world.
You are everywhere, what should I do, what should I do?
In my sky, you are weaving a thread, you are looking at my heart with your thoughts.
Oh oh beloved, are you the excitement in my heart? Is your grace the blessing that has come?
In this world without flowers, I have lived until I see you, I am like a flower in prison.
Your presence is the boundary of my life, I have searched for you, I have fallen in love with you.
You are everywhere, what should I do, what should I do?
In my sky, you are weaving a thread, you are looking at my heart with your thoughts.
I have wandered in the desert, you came like a river, you gave life to my world.
Oh, if my heart is water, you are the fish... if my love is a trap, you are the deer...
In my burning fire, you cool me down...
You are everywhere, what should I do, what should I do?
In my sky, you are weaving a thread, you are looking at my heart with your thoughts.
Oh oh beloved, are you the excitement in my heart? Is your grace the blessing that has come?
